import_t1.name: Energy Import T1
import_t1.description: Total energy consumed from the grid (Tariff 1) in kWh.

import_t2.name: Energy Import T2
import_t2.description: Total energy consumed from the grid (Tariff 2) in kWh.

export_t1.name: Energy Export T1
export_t1.description: Total energy returned to the grid (Tariff 1) in kWh.

export_t2.name: Energy Export T2
export_t2.description: Total energy returned to the grid (Tariff 2) in kWh.

active_power_consumed.name: Current Power Usage
active_power_consumed.description: Real-time power consumption in Watts or kW.

active_power_produced.name: Current Power Production
active_power_produced.description: Real-time solar production in Watts or kW (optional).

debug_mode.name: Enable Debug Logs
debug_mode.description: Show live data updates in the Add-on log.

device_serial.name: Device Serial Number
device_serial.description: (Optional) Manually set a 12-character hex serial/MAC address.

power_l1.name: Power L1
power_l1.description: Power usage on Phase 1 in Watts or kW (optional).

power_l2.name: Power L2
power_l2.description: Power usage on Phase 2 in Watts or kW (optional).

power_l3.name: Power L3
power_l3.description: Power usage on Phase 3 in Watts or kW (optional).

short_power_drop.name: Short Power Drop
short_power_drop.description: Binary sensor for short power drops (optional).
